arabic: وَحَدَّثَنِي عَنْ مَالِكٍ، عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ سَعِيدٍ، ‏.‏ أَنَّ عُمَرَ بْنَ الْخَطَّابِ، رَدَّ رَجُلاً مِنْ مَرِّ الظَّهْرَانِ لَمْ يَكُنْ وَدَّعَ الْبَيْتَ حَتَّى وَدَّعَ ‏.‏

english.text:
Yahya related to me from Malik from Yahya ibn Said that Umar ibn
al-Khattab refused to let one man who had not taken leave of the House
pass adh-Dhahran, (a valley eighteen miles from Makka) until he had
taken leave of it.
